name: Rise and Fall
overview: The story revolves around the host explaining the show where 4 celebrities, of which 2 in the penthouse, are trying to maintain their position as Rulers while 2 in the basement are fighting to Rise to the Penthouse to topple a Ruler.

trailers.title: Rise And Fall Official Trailer | Ashneer Grover, Arjun Bijlani & Kubbra Sait | Amazon MX Player
